mapper.insert: INSERT INTO races (race_date, place, race_name, distance, surface, weather, track_condition) VALUES (#{raceDate}, #{place}, #{raceName}, #{distance}, #{surface}, #{weather}, #{trackCondition})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS race_id, race_date, place, race_name, distance, surface, weather, track_condition FROM races ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id AS race_id, race_date, place, race_name, distance, surface, weather, track_condition FROM races WHERE id = #{raceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE races SET race_date = #{raceDate}, place = #{place}, race_name = #{raceName}, distance = #{distance}, surface = #{surface}, weather = #{weather}, track_condition = #{trackCondition} WHERE id = #{raceId}
